incidents.justification: Deepfake/Misinformation failure type as the support bot delivered a wrong information to the customer without fact checking and the Principle violated hardest is Reliability as AI did not work correctly.
The employees did not monitor the firm properly so i think failure type will be human oversight and principle violated hardest is transparency as one should be open about using AI.
Falure type will be deeepfake as a wrong video clip of someone was created and the principle violated hardest is safety as the wrong information deep fake videos can result in dangerous situations.

The failure type will be Bias/Discrimination as the company starts hiring just the male candidates because of a tool and the principle violated hardest is fairness as AI is not treating everyone equally without bias or discrimination.
Humans should monitor AI and someone must take responsibility when the AI makes a mistake.
The security can be breached this way and scammers will misue the tool.

stretch_notes: AI generated harmful content without suffiecinet safeguards.
